falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate extreme volatility or momentum, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a potential trend reversal or breakout.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset moves +15% from its current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A 15% upward move would invalidate the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern (which implies a bearish trend) and suggest a strong bullish reversal, disproving the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above 5000 or below 4500 (key support/resistance levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout at these levels would confirm a clear trend direction, falsifying the current HOLD signal and indicating the verdict's failure to predict a decisive market move.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
